rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 1px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
